response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with relevant geospatial/GIS background (GISCollective, Green Map) and prior low-latency systems work in DLang at Sociomantic, but the core requirement of modern C++ (or Rust) is essentially absent. His only C++ experience is ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, and Rust is not mentioned. Modern work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js. Worth a short technical screen only if pipeline/GIS domain knowledge and DLang systems experience are deemed transferable; otherwise pass.
strengths: Geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map
Low-latency, high-throughput service experience (DLang at Sociomantic)
Senior tenure at major engineering orgs (Stripe, Shopify) with strong testing/CI discipline
concerns: No modern C++ experience; only ~6 months of C/C++ over a decade ago
Recent work is web/full-stack (TS/Node), not systems-level pipeline engineering
